title: RankedTagger
description: A mod that lets you see your tier on Ranked.hu in-game
body:
# RankedTagger
![Time](https://hackatime-badge.hackclub.com/U0922GMGGTU/RankedTagger)

## If Ranked.hu keeps an API docs, I will keep maintaining this project.

This mod is similar to [TierTagger](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiertagger) but for a different tier list, [Ranked](https://ranked.hu/)

## The mod adds these features to the game:
- Show a player's tier in the selected gamemode next to their name
- If they don't have a tier in that gamemode, pick the highest they have and display that one
- If user wants, they can make the mod display the player's peak (all-time highest) tier
- /rankedreload command: reloades all the data
- /rankedprofile <name>: displays a profile of the player with the name <name> containing their tiers, works if player is offline too

## Building it yourself
```shell
git clone https://codeberg.org/JGJ52/RankedTagger.git
cd RankedTagger/
./gradlew build
```
